scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:game" "npm run dev:analyzer"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps && npm run build:server
scripts.build:packages: cd packages/shared-types && npm run build && cd ../shared-auth && npm run build && cd ../shared-ui && npm run build
scripts.build:apps: cd apps/dashboard && npm run build && cd ../deal-or-disaster && npm run build && cd ../property-analyzer && npm run build
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps && cd server && npm install && npm run build
